positive: A retro 8-bit pixel art design featuring a group of friendly, stylized robots having a picnic in a neon-lit futuristic park. Use limited color palettes (teal, magenta, yellow). Flat design, vector style, vaporwave aesthetic, perfect for t-shirt printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, realism, messy
